themeWords.meaning: the personal name of the God of Israel; the LORD
Jerusalem, the chief city of Israel

sentenceTheme: The LORD declares He will defend Jerusalem and Judah, empower the house of David, pour out a spirit of grace, and bring deep national mourning for the One they pierced.

verses.text: The burden of the word of the LORD for Israel, saith the LORD, which stretcheth forth the heavens, and layeth the foundation of the earth, and formeth the spirit of man within him.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of the God of Israel; the LORD
Israel; the name of Jacob and the nation descended from him

verses.text: Behold, I will make Jerusalem a cup of trembling unto all the people round about, when they shall be in the siege both against Judah and against Jerusalem.

highlightedWords.meaning: Jerusalem, the chief city of Israel
Judah; a son of Jacob, the tribe and southern kingdom

verses.text: And in that day will I make Jerusalem a burdensome stone for all people: all that burden themselves with it shall be cut in pieces, though all the people of the earth be gathered together against it.

highlightedWords.meaning: Jerusalem, the chief city of Israel
land, earth

verses.text: In that day, saith the LORD, I will smite every horse with astonishment, and his rider with madness: and I will open mine eyes upon the house of Judah, and will smite every horse of the people with blindness.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of the God of Israel; the LORD
Judah; a son of Jacob, the tribe and southern kingdom

verses.text: And the governors of Judah shall say in their heart, The inhabitants of Jerusalem shall be my strength in the LORD of hosts their God.

highlightedWords.meaning: Jerusalem, the chief city of Israel
the personal name of the God of Israel; the LORD

verses.text: In that day will I make the governors of Judah like an hearth of fire among the wood, and like a torch of fire in a sheaf; and they shall devour all the people round about, on the right hand and on the left: and Jerusalem shall be inhabited again in her own place, even in Jerusalem.

highlightedWords.meaning: Judah; a son of Jacob, the tribe and southern kingdom
Jerusalem, the chief city of Israel

verses.text: The LORD also shall save the tents of Judah first, that the glory of the house of David and the glory of the inhabitants of Jerusalem do not magnify themselves against Judah.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of the God of Israel; the LORD
David; beloved; the second king of Israel

verses.text: In that day shall the LORD defend the inhabitants of Jerusalem; and he that is feeble among them at that day shall be as David; and the house of David shall be as God, as the angel of the LORD before them.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of the God of Israel; the LORD
David; beloved; the second king of Israel

verses.text: And it shall come to pass in that day, that I will seek to destroy all the nations that come against Jerusalem.

highlightedWords.meaning: nation, people; often of the Gentiles
Jerusalem, the chief city of Israel

verses.text: And I will pour upon the house of David, and upon the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the spirit of grace and of supplications: and they shall look upon me whom they have pierced, and they shall mourn for him, as one mourneth for his only son, and shall be in bitterness for him, as one that is in bitterness for his firstborn.

highlightedWords.meaning: spirit, wind, breath
favor, grace

verses.text: In that day shall there be a great mourning in Jerusalem, as the mourning of Hadadrimmon in the valley of Megiddon.

highlightedWords.meaning: Jerusalem, the chief city of Israel
Megiddo/Megiddon; an ancient city/valley in Israel

verses.text: And the land shall mourn, every family apart; the family of the house of David apart, and their wives apart; the family of the house of Nathan apart, and their wives apart;

highlightedWords.meaning: land, earth
David; beloved; the second king of Israel

verses.text: The family of the house of Levi apart, and their wives apart; the family of Shimei apart, and their wives apart;

highlightedWords.meaning: family, clan
Levi; a son of Jacob and ancestor of the priestly tribe

verses.text: All the families that remain, every family apart, and their wives apart.

highlightedWords.meaning: families, clans
woman, wife
